title: Dinnerbone Gravity [Dinnerbone Floats]
description: The mobs named "Dinnerbone" fall upwards because they're upside down.
body:
## Description

The mobs with the name _Dinnerbone_ will change gravity. This is really cursed but when a mob is upside down, it has to have an upside down gravity!

## Some Info

- When you want that the mob doesn't changes gravity but stays upside down, you can name the mob Grumm.
- You can get help from my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/gXbxjnpg6M).
- I changed the name to Dinnerbone Gravity, because it fits better.
- If you for example installed 1.21.4 version of the pack and it says it is not compatible, don't trust that message. You installed the right one.
- Better use the datapack because the mod can have problems.

## Some uses for the datapack

As prank:

![🤣Oh... no!🫠](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/930a1ddae6427bc4465910b8e23d52720547e239.png)

As weapon:

![The poor zombie... 🫠](https://i.imgur.com/DKWWlry.gif)

## Changelog

### 1.0
- The mod and datapack releases.

### 1.1
- Compatibility for 1.20.x, 1.19.x, 1.18.x, 1.17.x and 1.16.x.
- Effect amplifier got higher.
- Fixed the issue that when changing the name to something else, the levitation kept going.

### 1.2
- New name: Dinnerbone Gravity
